_doc: Reviewed route-anchor exceptions. Overrides select a current canonical record. Non-GTFS dispositions exclude a record from current GTFS matching and bind the review to its expected literal route_id (or null).

route_q15a-historical-2025.reason: The official 2025 Queens Bus Network Redesign row records that Q15A service ended on June 29, 2025; the recovered record is a historical route identity and must not compete for a current GTFS anchor.

route_q20-2014-10-07-flushing-jamaica.reason: The official 2025 Queens Bus Network Redesign row records that Q20A service ended on June 29, 2025 and was replaced by the distinct current Q20 identity; the historical Q20A record must not compete for that current anchor.

route_q20b-cb12-2011.reason: The official 2025 Queens Bus Network Redesign row records that Q20B service ended on June 27, 2025; the recovered record is a historical route identity and must not compete for a current GTFS anchor.

route_q21-local-woodhaven-2014.reason: The official 2025 Queens Bus Network Redesign row records that Q21 service ended on August 31, 2025; the recovered record is a historical route identity and must not compete for a current GTFS anchor.

route_q34-queens.reason: The official 2025 Queens Bus Network Redesign row records that Q34 service ended on June 27, 2025; the recovered record is a historical route identity and must not compete for a current GTFS anchor.

route_q48-serves-lga-2011.reason: The official 2025 Queens Bus Network Redesign row records discontinuation of the historical LaGuardia Q48 and reuse of the Q48 designation for a distinct Glen Oaks service beginning June 30, 2025.

route_qm3-201110-qbb.reason: The official 2025 Queens Bus Network Redesign row records that QM3 service ended on June 27, 2025; the recovered record is a historical route identity and must not compete for a current GTFS anchor.
